name: 70" Cotton Round Tablecloth Dark Orange - Threshold™
description:
Create an eye-catching look on the table with the 70-Inch Cotton Round Tablecloth from Threshold™. Designed to fit a round table, this dark orange tablecloth is perfect for both everyday use and special occasions. The 100% cotton fabric offers quick drying, while the washable construction make cleanup easier. Simply add white plates and bowls, and decorate the table with a vase to create a beautiful dining set up for your meals.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
